import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"查设备信息列表"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/devices"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



查设备信息列表

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"Accesstoken","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Accesstoken}}"},"description":"通过授权获取的访问 Token。"},{"name":"Appid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Appid}}"},"description":"在 [Aqara 开发者平台](https://developer.aqara.com/) 创建应用时分配的 App ID。"},{"name":"Keyid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Keyid}}"},"description":"在 [Aqara 开发者平台](https://developer.aqara.com/) 创建应用时分配的 Key ID。"},{"name":"Nonce","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Nonce}}"},"description":"随机字符串，每次请求都不同。"},{"name":"Time","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Time}}"},"description":"请求时间戳，单位毫秒。"},{"name":"Sign","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Sign}}"},"description":"Request signature. For information on how to generate the signature, please refer to [Sign Generation Rules](https://opendoc.aqara.com/en/docs/developmanual/apiIntroduction/signGenerationRules.html)."},{"name":"Lang","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["zh","en"],"example":"en"},"description":"语言，默认英文。支持 'zh', 'en' 两种语言。"},{"name":"spaceIds","in":"query","description":"空间ID列表，为空查询所有设备","required":false,"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"style":"form","explode":true},{"name":"needChildren","in":"query","description":"是否需要查询子孙空间的设备，只有传了spaceIds条件，needChildren参数才有用","required":false,"schema":{"type":"boolean","default":false}},{"name":"state","in":"query","description":"设备在线状态（缺省时不做过滤条件）","required":false,"schema":{"type":"boolean","nullable":true}},{"name":"deviceTypesList","in":"query","description":"设备类型列表","required":false,"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"style":"form","explode":true},{"name":"deviceName","in":"query","description":"设备名称模糊匹配（不区分大小写，空白值自动忽略）","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"orderBy","in":"query","description":"排序方式","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","default":"createTime asc","enum":["createTime asc","createTime desc"]},"example":"createTime asc"},{"name":"pageNum","in":"query","description":"页码","required":false,"schema":{"type":"integer"},"example":1},{"name":"pageSize","in":"query","description":"每页数量","required":false,"schema":{"type":"integer"},"example":200}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"成功","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"Message type"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"API version","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"Message ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"Business status code, 0 indicates success"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Message"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"object","required":["totalCount","pageNum","pageSize","data"],"properties":{"totalCount":{"type":"integer","description":"Total number of devices that meet the conditions","example":3},"pageNum":{"type":"integer","description":"Current page number","example":1},"pageSize":{"type":"integer","description":"Current page size","example":200},"data":{"type":"array","description":"List of devices on the current page","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","deviceName","deviceTypesList","createTime","state","space"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"设备ID"},"deviceName":{"type":"string","description":"设备名称"},"deviceTypesList":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"},"description":"设备类型列表"},"createTime":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"创建时间（毫秒时间戳）"},"state":{"type":"boolean","description":"设备在线状态"},"space":{"type":"object","required":["parentSpaceId","spaceId","name"],"properties":{"parentSpaceId":{"type":"string"},"spaceId":{"type":"string"},"name":{"type":"string"}},"title":"DeviceSpace"}},"title":"DeviceInfo"}}},"title":"DeviceListData"}}}],"example":{"type":"GetDeviceInfoResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-000000000007","code":0,"message":"success","data":{"totalCount":3,"pageNum":1,"pageSize":200,"data":[{"deviceId":"device-001","deviceName":"客厅灯","deviceTypesList":["light"],"createTime":1710001234567,"state":true,"space":{"parentSpaceId":"space-home-001","spaceId":"space-room-001","name":"客厅"}}]}},"title":"DevicesResponse"},"examples":{"devicesPage":{"value":{"type":"GetDeviceInfoResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"1751609244328","code":0,"message":"success","data":{"totalCount":3,"pageNum":1,"pageSize":200,"data":[{"deviceId":"device-001","deviceName":"客厅灯","deviceTypesList":["light"],"createTime":1710001234567,"state":true,"space":{"parentSpaceId":"space-home-001","spaceId":"space-room-001","name":"客厅"}}]}}}}}}},"400":{"description":"Request
